components.text:
In Ascension we have a really specific Tier System which is categorized with Colors and ★ Stars. 

So basically it will be formatted like this. Color + 0/5 Stars and the color it is decides what Tier its at and the stars filled means at what stage the tier itself is in.

This is how it normally looks! 3 Filled stars and 2 empty ones which means its 3/5 stars!

Human Tier │ §6★★★☆☆ 

Earth Tier │ §4★★★☆☆ 

Heaven Tier │ §d★★★☆☆ 

Ascension Tier │ §b★★★☆☆
